I think: I am interested, but the headline is still mostly promise, not proof. I want to see an actual roadmap or first lesson before I spend attention here.
My reaction: The speed claims make me skeptical because they sound like marketing math. I would trust this more if I could inspect one concrete curriculum sample.
Idea: Put a complete sample roadmap and first lesson directly on the landing page.
Life-cost decision: Spending 1 month of life is only worth it if the next action gets me closer to a real curriculum sample or concrete learning outcome.
Truth assessment: My honest judgment is that Self Degree might be useful, but I am not convinced yet; confidence 0.68 because I only see the top of the page.
